footerTagline: Senior Product Designer and UX Strategist focused on AI-driven product experiences for SaaS and enterprise teams.

hero.description: Senior Product Designer with 8+ years designing SaaS and enterprise experiences that improve usability, engagement, and product growth.

projects.title: QuickHire
projects.description: Redesigned an AI-powered job matching platform. Focused on reducing cognitive load and increasing trust signals, cutting time-to-hire by 60%.

projects.title: Goutbond
projects.description: Designed a community-driven marketplace with AI-curated discovery. Personalization engine drove 3× increase in user retention and daily active usage.

projects.title: AI Genie
projects.description: Led end-to-end product design for an AI writing assistant. Reduced onboarding friction and improved workflow efficiency, growing DAU 85% in 3 months.

projects.title: E-Commerce Overhaul
projects.description: Complete checkout flow and PDP redesign for a D2C fashion brand. Streamlined 7-step checkout to 2 steps, boosting conversion rate by 45%.

projects.title: Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Scalable design system and data-rich analytics dashboard for a B2B SaaS platform, serving 200k+ users across enterprise tiers.

projects.title: Fintech Onboarding
projects.description: Streamlined multi-step KYC onboarding for a neobank, reducing funnel drop-off by 40% through progressive disclosure.

projects.title: Healthcare Portal
projects.description: Patient-facing portal redesign with accessibility at its core. Task completion jumped 65% and WCAG AA compliance achieved.

projects.title: SaaS Pricing Page
projects.description: High-converting pricing page with dynamic plan comparison and social proof systems. Resulted in a 35% lift in MRR.

projects.title: Mobile Banking App
projects.description: Full UX overhaul of iOS/Android banking app, taking App Store rating from 2.1 to 4.7 through deep usability research.

tools.title: UX Evaluation Report Generator
tools.description: A structured framework for running heuristic reviews, surfacing usability issues, and exporting stakeholder-ready reports.

tools.title: Growth Priority Mapper
tools.description: A decision tool for ranking UX and product opportunities by business impact, implementation effort, and conversion lift.

books.title: Journey from Graphic Designer to Product Designer
books.description: A practical transition story on growing from visual execution into product thinking, systems, research, and strategy.

books.title: Designing for AI Trust
books.description: A field guide for creating explainable AI experiences that users understand, trust, and adopt more quickly.

blogPosts.title: Build Fast Without Breaking Trust
blogPosts.description: How to move quickly on product experiments without creating confusing UX or undermining user confidence.

blogPosts.title: Cognitive Load in Product Design
blogPosts.description: A breakdown of why users stall, hesitate, or abandon flows when interfaces ask for too much thinking at once.

blogPosts.title: From UX Audits to Growth Roadmaps
blogPosts.description: A practical method for translating design observations into business-prioritized product action.
